# PERF-129 negative: range by index when only the index is needed
lang: go
file: PERF-129-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Indices(xs []int) []int {
	out := make([]int, 0, len(xs))
	for i := range xs {
		out = append(out, i)
	}
	return out
}

func _() {
	fmt.Println(Indices([]int{1, 2, 3}))
}
